'''''The Empire Strikes Back Annual'' No. 2''' was a hardcover comic book released in the United Kingdom that reprinted the stories from [[Star Wars (1977) 46|''Star Wars'' (1977) 46]] and [[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]]. The first story was previously printed in the UK in [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 141|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 141]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-in-the-uk-star-wars-comic-book-annuals|text=''Star Wars'' in the UK: ''Star Wars'' Comic Book Annuals}}</ref>

As in most UK Annuals that use a previous cover, this one uses a retouched version of the cover of [[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]], featuring cut side edges and darker overall color tone, because of usual printing needs to make an album format from a comic book.
